title: Metal-Triazole Combinatorial Library
description: 864 metal-triazole compounds from two combinatorial series (Tz-4-P and Tz-1-MP) across multiple metal scaffolds (IrCN, Re(CO)₃, Mn(CO)₃, RuCy), screened for antibacterial activity against S. aureus and cytotoxicity against HEK293T cells.
